scripts.build: npm run build -w @groceryview/core && npm run build -w @groceryview/geo && npm run build -w @groceryview/db && npm run build -w @groceryview/api && npm run build -w @groceryview/auth && npm run build -w @groceryview/notifications && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.openapi:generate: npm run build && node dist/openapi.js generate
scripts.openapi:check: npm run build && node dist/openapi.js check
scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.js
